notes: v0.26.0 — TESTS tab in the top nav (rightmost). Opens an in-game SHIP LAB sandbox previewing 20 example ship redesigns (4 classes × 5 skins) using the 5-layer mandala approach: OUTER RING (class silhouette, locked) + WING PLATES + CORE + TRAIL + ACCENT GEMS. Every tile renders a live procedurally-drawn ship with a layer breakdown spelling out which slot variant the skin uses. Pure prototype — nothing wired into the live ships yet; use this to pick a direction.
